# GET /api/menu/user-menu/{userId}

**Get menu for specific user (Admin)**

Admin: View menu structure for any user. Useful for debugging permission issues.

Operation ID: `getUserMenuById`

**Authentication**

Required (Bearer Authentication).

**Required permission(s)**: USER_VIEW (found on controller)

## Path Parameters

| Name | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| userId | integer | Yes |  |

| icon | string | No |  |  |

| description | string | No |  |  |
